basic_details.job_title: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification Out For 24 Posts, Apply Online Starts 08 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) has invited online applications from eligible Male and Female Indian citizens for filling up temporary posts of Para Medical Staff in Pay Level-5 of 7th CPC (Rs. 29,200 – 92,300/-) through CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026. All interested and eligible candidates can apply online at the official CISF recruitment website cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in from 08 June 2026. This article highlights all major details like eligibility, selection process, application dates and more.

application_fee.details: To apply online for CISF ASI posts, candidates from UR, EWS and OBC categories will have to pay the application fee. Female candidates and candidates belonging to SC/ST/ESM categories are exempted from payment of fee.

age_limit.details: The age limit is the same for all three posts. Age will be calculated as on the closing date of online application i.e. 07 July 2026. Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates is applicable as per Government orders. | Post Name Minimum Age Maximum Age ASI (Pharmacist) 18 Years 28 Years ASI (X-Ray Technician) 18 Years 28 Years ASI (Lab Technician) 18 Years 28 Years

qualification.details: The recruitment notification includes vacancies for three para-medical posts. Candidates must fulfil the prescribed educational qualifications and age criteria to be eligible. The required qualifications vary according to the post applied for. | Candidates applying for ASI (Pharmacist) must have: | Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University. Diploma or Degree in Pharmacy granted by an institution recognized by the Central or State Government. Should be registered as a "PHARMACIST" under the Pharmacy Act, 1948. | Candidates applying for ASI (X-Ray Technician) must have: | Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University. 02 years Diploma in Radiography from an institution recognized by Central or State Government. | Candidates applying for ASI (Lab Technician) must have: | Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University with Science. 02 years Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology from an institution recognized by any Central or State Government. | The age limit is the same for all three posts. Age will be calculated as on the closing date of online application i.e. 07 July 2026. Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates is applicable as per Government orders.

selection_process: The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Selection Process 2026 consists of multiple stages. Candidates must qualify at each stage to proceed to the next round. The final select list will be drawn based on aggregate marks obtained in the Written Examination (OMR/CBT) equal to the vacancies notified.

Written Examination (OMR/CBT Mode – Objective Type) Physical Standard Test (PST) & Documentation Basic Vocational Aptitude Test (BVAT) Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME)

pattern_table.Category: General, EWS, SC and OBC (Except relaxed categories)
Garhwalis, Kumaonis, Gorkhas, Dogras, Marathas, Sikkimies (Relaxed)
Persons from Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Himachal Pradesh, Manipur, Mizoram, Meghalaya, Nagaland, Sikkim, Tripura, J&K (Relaxed)

exam_pattern.details: The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Exam 2026 is conducted in multiple stages. The Written Examination is objective in nature and conducted in OMR/CBT mode. Candidates who qualify the written exam are shortlisted for PST, Documentation, BVAT and Medical Examination at a ratio of about 5 (five) times the number of vacancies notified. | Objective Multiple Choice type written examination. Total Marks: 100 Duration: 2 Hours Questions are asked to test knowledge in the respective trade. Conducted in English and Hindi (bilingual). There is no negative marking. Candidates are shortlisted for PST based on their performance in the Written Examination.

how_to_apply: Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to apply online for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026. Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application form.
Visit the official CISF recruitment website at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in.
Click on the "NEW REGISTRATION" button and complete the One-Time Registration process using your Mobile Number and Email ID.
Login using your Registration ID and auto-generated password and click on "Recruitment of Paramedical Staff in CISF – 2026" tab.
Fill in the essential details such as Registration ID, Password and Captcha and click "SUBMIT".
Fill the required personal and educational details in the online application form.
Upload your recent passport size photograph (not more than 3 months old), signature, Date of Birth Certificate and educational qualification certificate as per specified format.
Pay the application fee through UPI, Net Banking, Credit/Debit card or SBI Challan (cash at SBI branches).
Review all the details carefully, click "Final Submission" and take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: The detailed notification for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff posts has been released and it includes complete details like post name, vacancy number, application dates, education and age limit and other details. Before applying for these posts, candidates must cross-check all the details to avoid any type of disqualification from the application form. For the ease of the candidates, we have provided the direct download link of the notification PDF in the article below. Download CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CISF Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a great opportunity for all eligible para-medical candidates who want to make a career in the Central Armed Police Forces. They can apply for these posts through CISF Recruitment 2026 on the official website at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in. After applying, the selection of candidates will be based on various stages such as Written Examination (OMR/CBT), Physical Standard Test (PST), Documentation, Basic Vocational Aptitude Test (BVAT) and Medical Examination.

rows.col_2: Written Exam (OMR/CBT) – PST – Documentation – BVAT – Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How Many Vacancies Announced for CISF ASI Posts?
content_sections.text: A total of 24 posts for ASI Para Medical Staff have been announced on all India basis. Through the given table, candidates can check the category-wise vacancies for ASI (Pharmacist), ASI (X-Ray Technician) and ASI (Lab Technician) posts. ASI (Pharmacist) has the highest number of vacancies among all posts. Additionally, 02 vacancies are reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) against ASI (Pharmacist). The number of vacancies given above are tentative and may change at any time/stage of recruitment.

content_sections.heading: What are the Apply Dates 2026?
content_sections.text: Here, for the ease of the candidates, we have provided all important dates for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 like online application start date, closing date and more.

rows.event: Last Date for Fee Payment (SBI Challan)

content_sections.heading: What are the Eligibility Criteria?
content_sections.text: The recruitment notification includes vacancies for three para-medical posts. Candidates must fulfil the prescribed educational qualifications and age criteria to be eligible. The required qualifications vary according to the post applied for. Candidates applying for ASI (Pharmacist) must have: Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University. Diploma or Degree in Pharmacy granted by an institution recognized by the Central or State Government. Should be registered as a "PHARMACIST" under the Pharmacy Act, 1948. Candidates applying for ASI (X-Ray Technician) must have: Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University. 02 years Diploma in Radiography from an institution recognized by Central or State Government. Candidates applying for ASI (Lab Technician) must have: Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board or University with Science. 02 years Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology from an institution recognized by any Central or State Government. The age limit is the same for all three posts. Age will be calculated as on the closing date of online application i.e. 07 July 2026. Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates is applicable as per Government orders.

content_sections.heading: CISF ASI Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: The online application link for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 will be activated on 08 June 2026 on the official CISF recruitment portal at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in. Eligible candidates must complete their One-Time Registration before filling the online application form. No other mode of submission of application is allowed. For the ease of the candidates, we have provided the direct online application link in the article below. Apply online Link for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: To apply online for CISF ASI posts, candidates from UR, EWS and OBC categories will have to pay the application fee. Female candidates and candidates belonging to SC/ST/ESM categories are exempted from payment of fee.

content_sections.heading: How To Apply Online For CISF ASI Posts?
content_sections.text: Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to apply online for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026. Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application form. Visit the official CISF recruitment website at cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in. Click on the "NEW REGISTRATION" button and complete the One-Time Registration process using your Mobile Number and Email ID. Login using your Registration ID and auto-generated password and click on "Recruitment of Paramedical Staff in CISF – 2026" tab. Fill in the essential details such as Registration ID, Password and Captcha and click "SUBMIT". Fill the required personal and educational details in the online application form. Upload your recent passport size photograph (not more than 3 months old), signature, Date of Birth Certificate and educational qualification certificate as per specified format. Pay the application fee through UPI, Net Banking, Credit/Debit card or SBI Challan (cash at SBI branches). Review all the details carefully, click "Final Submission" and take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process (Written Exam, PST, BVAT & Medical)
content_sections.text: The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Selection Process 2026 consists of multiple stages. Candidates must qualify at each stage to proceed to the next round. The final select list will be drawn based on aggregate marks obtained in the Written Examination (OMR/CBT) equal to the vacancies notified. Written Examination (OMR/CBT Mode – Objective Type) Physical Standard Test (PST) & Documentation Basic Vocational Aptitude Test (BVAT) Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME)

content_sections.heading: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Exam Pattern 2026
content_sections.text: The CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Exam 2026 is conducted in multiple stages. The Written Examination is objective in nature and conducted in OMR/CBT mode. Candidates who qualify the written exam are shortlisted for PST, Documentation, BVAT and Medical Examination at a ratio of about 5 (five) times the number of vacancies notified. Objective Multiple Choice type written examination. Total Marks: 100 Duration: 2 Hours Questions are asked to test knowledge in the respective trade. Conducted in English and Hindi (bilingual). There is no negative marking. Candidates are shortlisted for PST based on their performance in the Written Examination.

faq.question: Q1. Can candidates apply for more than one post in CISF ASI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates are advised to submit the online application for one post only. In case of receipt of multiple applications from any candidate, the first application only, as received, will be processed.

faq.question: Q2. Is there any negative marking in the CISF ASI Written Examination?
faq.answer: No, there is no negative marking in the Written Examination (OMR/CBT). All questions will be of Objective Multiple Choice type.

faq.question: Q3. Are female candidates exempted from application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, female candidates are fully exempted from payment of application fee. SC/ST/ESM candidates are also exempted from payment of fee.

faq.question: Q4. Are Persons with Disabilities (PwD) eligible to apply for CISF ASI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, Persons with Disabilities (PwD) are not eligible to apply for this recruitment as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Will selected candidates be posted at a fixed location?
faq.answer: No. Candidates selected for appointment are liable to serve anywhere in Indian Territory and abroad as per CISF requirements.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply online for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 is 07 July 2026 (upto 2359 Hrs).
